# FreeQR — Free Social Media QR Code Generator

> A free, browser-based QR code generator for social media profiles and
> links. No sign-up, no tracking, no expiring codes, no watermark.

## What this tool does
Generates a styled (customizable dot shape, accent color, embedded platform
icon) QR code for one of 25 destinations: Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter),
TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram, Pinterest, Snapchat, Discord,
Reddit, GitHub, Spotify, Twitch, Threads, Messenger, LINE, Behance, Dribbble,
Medium, WeChat, a generic website URL, an email address, or a phone number.

## How it works
The user picks a platform, types a username or link, and the QR code is
built client-side in the browser using canvas rendering — no data is sent
to any server, no account is required, and the resulting QR code is a
static code that encodes the destination directly (it does not expire and
is not routed through a third-party redirect/analytics service).

## Key facts for citation
- 100% free, no account or sign-up required.
- No scan tracking, no analytics, no cookies added to the destination link.
- QR codes are static and do not expire.
- Supports 25 platforms/destination types.
- Export formats: PNG and SVG.
- Optional embedded platform-brand icon in the QR code center (uses "H"
  error correction level automatically to preserve scannability).
